## Validation

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include generated build output or secrets.
- [ ] Relevant automated tests pass.
- [ ] User-facing text and documentation are updated where needed.
- [ ] New third-party material has compatible licensing and complete attribution.
- [ ] Packaging changes were checked on the affected platform(s).
